description: Use this API to construct network equivalents of the positive and zero sequence networks and calculates source impedances at equivalent source nodes for all three sequences in preparation for the unbalanced fault analysis activities of PSSE. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = sceq(sid, all, status, thresh, rfile, sfile)
python_syntax: ierr = sceq(sid, all, status, thresh, rfile, sfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Transformer impedance correction option. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: thresh
parameters.description: Equivalent branch threshold tolerance. (input; 10.0 by default).

parameters.name: rfile
parameters.description: Power flow raw data file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Sequence data file; blank for none. (input; blank by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

status.description: do not apply to zero sequence.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
case is not subject to classical assumptions.
error writing the working case to a temporary file.
no buses being processed for equivalence.
too many branches in the equivalent.
bus type codes other than 1, 2, 4, 5 and 6 present.
substations present in subsystem to be equivalenced.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
